title: taraxacum exsurgens
intro: Taraxacum exsurgens is a lesser-known species of the dandelion plant, often found in mountainous regions of Europe. As a medicinal plant, Taraxacum exsurgens has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, due to its bitter and astringent properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum exsurgens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
